items.title: Metabolic reprogramming via SIRT2-deficient microglial large extracellular vesicles ameliorates alzheimer's pathology.
items.authors: Xiaolu Tang; Rui Chen; Jiawei Xing; Qing Huang; Lv Luo; Chaoyue Ouyang; Fubin Ma; Jie Wen
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Current therapies for Alzheimer's disease (AD) offer only symptomatic relief, highlighting the urgent need for disease-modifying approaches capable of halting or reversing neurodegeneration. Extracellular vesicles (EVs) have attracted growing interest as therapeutic vehicles owing to their inherent capacity to bypass the blood-brain barrier and deliver complex biological cargo to the central nervous system. METHODS: Here, we examined whether large EVs (LEVs) derived from microglia with stable Sirtuin-2 knockdown (SIRT2-KD) confer the neuroprotective effects associated with SIRT2 inhibition. LEVs harvested from SIRT2-KD microglia were administered intranasally to APP/PS1 mice. We assessed microglial uptake of LEVs, along with subsequent changes in cellular metabolism, migration toward amyloid-beta (Aβ) plaques, phagocytic activity, and downstream pathological and behavioral outcomes. Proteomic and acetylomic profiling were employed to characterize the molecular cargo of LEVs-SIRT2-KD. RESULTS: LEVs-SIRT2-KD were readily internalized by microglia in vivo following intranasal delivery. Uptake of these vesicles markedly enhanced microglial bioenergetics, driving coordinated upregulation of both oxidative phosphorylation and glycolysis. This metabolic shift was accompanied by improved microglial recruitment to Aβ plaques and increased phagocytic clearance. Consequently, treated mice showed reduced Aβ plaque deposition, restored synaptic integrity, and reversal of cognitive deficits. Proteomic and acetylomic analyses revealed that LEVs-SIRT2-KD are selectively enriched in proteins and acetylation modifications linked to energy metabolism and phagocytic function, offering a mechanistic basis for the observed metabolic reprogramming. CONCLUSION: Together, these results identify LEVs as a critical vesicle subtype mediating the effects of SIRT2 knockdown and support a cell-free therapeutic strategy for AD centered on EVs-driven metabolic reprogramming of microglia.
items.title_en: Metabolic reprogramming via SIRT2-deficient microglial large extracellular vesicles ameliorates alzheimer's pathology.
items.title_cn: 通过 SIRT2 缺陷的小胶质细胞大细胞外囊泡进行代谢重编程可改善阿尔茨海默病的病理。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：目前阿尔茨海默病（AD）的治疗只能缓解症状，这凸显了迫切需要能够阻止或逆转神经退行性变的疾病缓解方法。细胞外囊泡（EV）作为治疗载体引起了越来越多的兴趣，因为它们具有绕过血脑屏障并将复杂的生物货物输送到中枢神经系统的固有能力。方法：在这里，我们检查了来自具有稳定 Sirtuin-2 敲低 (SIRT2-KD) 的小胶质细胞的大 EV (LEV) 是否具有与 SIRT2 抑制相关的神经保护作用。将从 SIRT2-KD 小胶质细胞收获的 LEV 鼻内给予 APP/PS1 小鼠。我们评估了小胶质细胞对 LEV 的摄取，以及细胞代谢的后续变化、向淀粉样蛋白-β (Aβ) 斑块的迁移、吞噬细胞活性以及下游病理和行为结果。采用蛋白质组学和乙酰组学分析来表征 LEVs-SIRT2-KD 的分子货物。结果：鼻内递送后，LEVs-SIRT2-KD 很容易被体内小胶质细胞内化。这些囊泡的摄取显着增强了小胶质细胞的生物能，驱动氧化磷酸化和糖酵解的协调上调。这种代谢转变伴随着小胶质细胞向 Aβ 斑块募集的改善和吞噬细胞清除的增加。因此，接受治疗的小鼠表现出 Aβ 斑块沉积减少、突触完整性恢复和认知缺陷逆转。蛋白质组学和乙酰组学分析表明，LEVs-SIRT2-KD 选择性富集与能量代谢和吞噬功能相关的蛋白质和乙酰化修饰，为观察到的代谢重编程提供了机制基础。结论：总的来说，这些结果确定 LEV 是介导 SIRT2 敲低效应的关键囊泡亚型，并支持以 EV 驱动的小胶质细胞代谢重编程为中心的 AD 无细胞治疗策略。

items.title: A BRD4/p300/SP1 epigenetic cascade drives microglial P2X4R transcription and promotes neuropathic pain.
items.authors: Daojuan Wang; Tingyu Wang; Yin Li; Xinye Yu; Shenquan Cai; Chun Wang; Yihan Wang; Zhengquan Zhu
items.abstract: Persistent upregulation of the purinergic receptor P2X4R is strongly associated with microglial activation in neuropathic pain, yet the epigenetic mechanisms linking chromatin remodeling to its dysregulation remain unclear. Here, we delineate a hierarchical epigenetic cascade that promotes transcriptional activation of P2X4R in spinal microglia following nerve injury. In a mouse spared nerve injury (SNI) model, microglial activation was accompanied by increased expression of P2X4R and the histone acetyltransferase p300, together with enhanced histone acetylation (H3K9ac, H3K27ac, H4K5ac, and H4K8ac) and increased chromatin accessibility at the P2rx4 promoter. Microglia-specific deletion of p300 blunted injury-induced histone acetylation and suppressed P2X4R upregulation. We further demonstrate that the acetylation reader BRD4 is recruited to these regions and cooperates with the transcription factor SP1 to drive P2rx4 transcription, supported by chromatin analyses revealing inducible assembly of a BRD4-p300-SP1 axis. Disruption of this cascade via p300 inhibition (C646) or BRD4 blockade (JQ1) attenuated spinal neuroinflammation and alleviated nociceptive hypersensitivity. Notably, reactivation of P2X4R by BzATP largely reversed the analgesic effects of BRD4 inhibition, establishing P2X4R as a critical downstream effector. Collectively, these findings support a p300-BRD4-SP1 epigenetic cascade linking chromatin remodeling to microglia-mediated neuropathic pain, highlighting this pathway as a potential therapeutic target.
items.title_en: A BRD4/p300/SP1 epigenetic cascade drives microglial P2X4R transcription and promotes neuropathic pain.
items.title_cn: BRD4/p300/SP1 表观遗传级联驱动小胶质细胞 P2X4R 转录并促进神经性疼痛。
items.abstract_cn: 嘌呤能受体 P2X4R 的持续上调与神经性疼痛中的小胶质细胞激活密切相关，但将染色质重塑与其失调联系起来的表观遗传机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们描绘了一个分层的表观遗传级联，它促进神经损伤后脊髓小胶质细胞中 P2X4R 的转录激活。在小鼠神经损伤 (SNI) 模型中，小胶质细胞激活伴随着 P2X4R 和组蛋白乙酰转移酶 p300 表达的增加，以及组蛋白乙酰化（H3K9ac、H3K27ac、H4K5ac 和 H4K8ac）的增强以及 P2rx4 启动子处染色质可及性的增加。小胶质细胞特异性删除 p300 会减弱损伤诱导的组蛋白乙酰化并抑制 P2X4R 上调。我们进一步证明，乙酰化阅读器 BRD4 被招募到这些区域，并与转录因子 SP1 合作驱动 P2rx4 转录，染色质分析显示 BRD4-p300-SP1 轴的诱导组装，这支持了这一点。通过 p300 抑制 (C646) 或 BRD4 阻断 (JQ1) 破坏该级联可减轻脊髓神经炎症并减轻伤害性超敏反应。值得注意的是，BzATP 重新激活 P2X4R 在很大程度上逆转了 BRD4 抑制的镇痛作用，从而确立了 P2X4R 作为关键下游效应器的地位。总的来说，这些发现支持 p300-BRD4-SP1 表观遗传级联将染色质重塑与小胶质细胞介导的神经性疼痛联系起来，强调该通路作为潜在的治疗靶点。

items.title: Air-Liquid interface midbrain organoids model the pathological features of Parkinson's disease.
items.authors: Sara Kälvälä; Polina Abushik; Mohammad Rezaie; Antonios Dougalis; Jari Koistinaho; Maria Gardberg; Kelvin C Luk; Tarja Malm
items.abstract: Human-induced pluripotent stem cell-derived midbrain organoids offer a promising platform for modeling Parkinson's disease (PD). Yet, their utility has been limited by the absence of microglia and the development of a necrotic core during maturation. Here, we present an air-liquid interface (ALI) slice culture system for extended cultivation of midbrain organoids (mORGs), enabling efficient microglial integration, improved neuronal viability, and enhanced functional maturation. Compared with conventional mORGs grown in suspension cultures, the ALI method supports more consistent engraftment of microglial progenitors and the development of astrocytes and oligodendrocyte progenitors, as revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing. Functionally, ALI-mORGs exhibited robust and reproducible neural network activity, with N-methyl-D-aspartate (NMDA) stimulation reliably inducing synchronous bursting, as measured by 3D microelectrode array recordings. Importantly, exposure to alpha-synuclein (αSyn) preformed fibrils triggered the progressive accumulation of phosphorylated αSyn inclusions, closely recapitulating key features of PD pathology. The ALI-mORG model addresses major limitations of existing systems and provides a more physiologically relevant platform for investigating cellular mechanisms of PD and for supporting future therapeutic strategies.
items.title_en: Air-Liquid interface midbrain organoids model the pathological features of Parkinson's disease.
items.title_cn: 气液界面中脑类器官模拟帕金森病的病理特征。
items.abstract_cn: 人类诱导的多能干细胞衍生的中脑类器官为帕金森病（PD）建模提供了一个有前景的平台。然而，由于小胶质细胞的缺乏和成熟过程中坏死核心的发展，它们的实用性受到限制。在这里，我们提出了一种气液界面（ALI）切片培养系统，用于中脑类器官（mORG）的扩展培养，从而实现有效的小胶质细胞整合，提高神经元活力并增强功能成熟。单细胞 RNA 测序显示，与悬浮培养中生长的传统 mORG 相比，ALI 方法支持更一致的小胶质细胞祖细胞植入以及星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞祖细胞的发育。在功能上，ALI-mORG 表现出强大且可重复的神经网络活动，通过 3D 微电极阵列记录测量，N-甲基-D-天冬氨酸 (NMDA) 刺激可靠地诱导同步爆发。重要的是，暴露于α-突触核蛋白（αSyn）预形成的原纤维会引发磷酸化αSyn内含物的逐渐积累，这密切地概括了PD病理学的关键特征。 ALI-mORG 模型解决了现有系统的主要局限性，并为研究 PD 的细胞机制和支持未来的治疗策略提供了一个更具生理相关性的平台。

items.title: The Exercise-CTSS-AD Axis: a novel framework for understanding exercise-induced neuroprotection in Alzheimer's disease.
items.authors: Dong Yang; Wen Guo; Bihan Wang
items.abstract: Disease-modifying therapies for Alzheimer's disease (AD) targeting amyloid-β and tau have consistently failed, highlighting the urgent need for innovative therapeutic strategies. Cathepsin S (CTSS), a lysosomal cysteine protease upregulated in AD, functions as a "multifaceted disruptor" that interconnects neuroinflammation, blood-brain barrier (BBB) dysfunction, and Aβ metabolic dysregulation. Although exercise is a validated non-pharmacological intervention that mitigates AD pathology, its multi-target molecular mechanisms remain elusive. Here, we propose and substantiate the "Exercise-CTSS-AD Axis" hypothesis, positing that exercise confers neuroprotection by suppressing CTSS through synergistic anti-inflammatory, anti-aging, and metabolic regulatory pathways. Exercise-induced myokines and clearance of senescent cells inhibit CTSS transcription, while AMPK-TFEB axis activation enhances lysosomal function to repress CTSS enzymatic activity. This systemic CTSS suppression preserves BBB integrity, ameliorates microglia-driven neuroinflammation, and restores Aβ homeostasis by reducing production and enhancing clearance. Our framework provides a unifying molecular explanation for the pleiotropic benefits of exercise, positions CTSS as a quantifiable biomarker for personalized exercise regimens, and supports an innovative combinatorial strategy: "Exercise + low-dose CTSS inhibitors" as a disease-modifying therapy for AD.
items.title_en: The Exercise-CTSS-AD Axis: a novel framework for understanding exercise-induced neuroprotection in Alzheimer's disease.
items.title_cn: 运动-CTSS-AD 轴：了解运动诱导的阿尔茨海默病神经保护作用的新框架。
items.abstract_cn: 针对阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的针对淀粉样蛋白-β 和 tau 蛋白的疾病修饰疗法一直失败，这凸显了对创新治疗策略的迫切需要。组织蛋白酶 S (CTSS) 是一种在 AD 中上调的溶酶体半胱氨酸蛋白酶，作为一种“多方面的干扰物”，将神经炎症、血脑屏障 (BBB) 功能障碍和 Aβ 代谢失调联系起来。尽管运动是一种经过验证的非药物干预措施，可以减轻 AD 病理，但其多靶点分子机制仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们提出并证实了“运动-CTSS-AD轴”假说，认为运动通过协同抗炎、抗衰老和代谢调节途径抑制CTSS，从而实现神经保护。运动诱导的肌因子和衰老细胞的清除抑制 CTSS 转录，而 AMPK-TFEB 轴激活增强溶酶体功能以抑制 CTSS 酶活性。这种全身性 CTSS 抑制可保持 BBB 完整性，改善小胶质细胞驱动的神经炎症，并通过减少产生和增强清除来恢复 Aβ 稳态。我们的框架为运动的多效性益处提供了统一的分子解释，将 CTSS 定位为个性化运动方案的可量化生物标志物，并支持创新的组合策略：“运动 + 低剂量 CTSS 抑制剂”作为 AD 的疾病缓解疗法。

items.title: KOLF2.1J iTF-Microglia: A standardized platform to study microglial transcriptional regulatory networks in CNS disease.
items.authors: Brianne B Rogers; Ashlyn G Anderson; Ivan Rodriguez-Nunez; Samuel C Bartley; S Quinn Johnston; Jared W Taylor; Sarah K Meadows; Kimberly M Newberry
items.abstract: Understanding transcriptional regulatory networks (TRNs) in microglia is essential for elucidating mechanisms underlying central nervous system (CNS) disorders. Human induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC)-derived models enable mechanistic studies of microglia but often suffer from variability across lines. Here, we use the standardized KOLF2.1J iPSC line, engineered to inducibly express six transcription factors that allow rapid generation of microglia-like cells (iTF-microglia). We profile TRNs under homeostatic and inflammatory conditions and show that iTF-microglia resemble primary brain microglia at transcriptomic and epigenomic levels. Integrative analyses identify microglia-enriched candidate cis-regulatory elements (cCREs) and reveal dynamic enhancer remodeling during differentiation and stimulation with lipopolysaccharide (LPS) or interferon-gamma (IFNγ), involving NF-κB, IRF, and STAT transcription factors. TRNs active in iTF-microglia are enriched for genetic variants linked to Alzheimer's disease and related CNS disorders. These findings establish KOLF2.1J iTF-microglia as a reproducible, genetically tractable system for dissecting microglial gene regulation and TRN remodeling in disease.
items.title_en: KOLF2.1J iTF-Microglia: A standardized platform to study microglial transcriptional regulatory networks in CNS disease.
items.title_cn: KOLF2.1J iTF-Microglia：研究中枢神经系统疾病中小胶质细胞转录调控网络的标准化平台。
items.abstract_cn: 了解小胶质细胞中的转录调控网络 (TRN) 对于阐明中枢神经系统 (CNS) 疾病的机制至关重要。人类诱导多能干细胞 (iPSC) 衍生的模型可以对小胶质细胞进行机制研究，但常常存在跨系变异性。在这里，我们使用标准化的 KOLF2.1J iPSC 系，该系经过改造可诱导表达六种转录因子，从而可以快速生成小胶质细胞样细胞（iTF-小胶质细胞）。我们对稳态和炎症条件下的 TRN 进行了分析，结果表明 iTF 小胶质细胞在转录组和表观基因组水平上与原代脑小胶质细胞相似。综合分析确定了富含小胶质细胞的候选顺式调节元件 (cCRE)，并揭示了分化和脂多糖 (LPS) 或干扰素-γ (IFNγ) 刺激过程中的动态增强子重塑，涉及 NF-κB、IRF 和 STAT 转录因子。 iTF-小胶质细胞中活跃的 TRN 富含与阿尔茨海默病和相关中枢神经系统疾病相关的遗传变异。这些发现将 KOLF2.1J iTF-小胶质细胞确立为一种可重复、遗传易处理的系统，用于剖析疾病中的小胶质细胞基因调控和 TRN 重塑。

items.title: Neuroinflammation in the medial prefrontal cortex is associated with early-life stress susceptibility in male rats.
items.authors: Bing-Bing Liao; Ying-Dan Zhang; Yi Li; Fei Tian; Xi-Dan Zhou; Zhen Wang; Dong-Dong Shi
items.abstract: Early-life stress increases individuals' susceptibility to developing anxiety and depression disorders in adulthood, but a substantial proportion of individuals are resilient to these disorders. The medial prefrontal cortex (mPFC) serves as a key neural substrate underlying stress susceptibility and resilience. Nevertheless, the precise neurobiological mechanisms governing these differential stress responses remain incompletely understood. To elucidate the role of mPFC in the neural mechanisms underlying stress susceptibility and resilience, adult rats exposed to early-life stress were stratified into stress-susceptible and stress-resilient groups based on anxiety- and depression-like behavioral phenotypes. Transcriptomic sequencing of the mPFC was performed to identify differentially regulated pathways and genes. The TNF-associated pathway was significantly upregulated in the susceptible group. Next, integrated omics analysis implicated inflammatory signaling as a pivotal mechanistic contributor, which was further validated using molecular biological assays. Further immunofluorescence staining revealed that the density of astrocytes decreased and activated microglia with decreased intersections increased in the mPFC of susceptible rats. Overall, these findings suggest that neuroinflammation in the mPFC plays a significant role in behavioral and neurobiological changes in susceptible male rats.
items.title_en: Neuroinflammation in the medial prefrontal cortex is associated with early-life stress susceptibility in male rats.
items.title_cn: 内侧前额叶皮层的神经炎症与雄性大鼠生命早期的应激敏感性有关。
items.abstract_cn: 早期生活的压力会增加个体在成年后患焦虑症和抑郁症的可能性，但相当一部分人对这些疾病具有抵抗力。内侧前额叶皮层 (mPFC) 是压力敏感性和恢复力的关键神经基质。然而，控制这些差异应激反应的精确神经生物学机制仍不完全清楚。为了阐明 mPFC 在压力敏感性和恢复力神经机制中的作用，根据焦虑和抑郁样行为表型，将生命早期暴露于压力的成年大鼠分为压力敏感组和压力恢复组。对 mPFC 进行转录组测序，以确定差异调节的途径和基因。 TNF相关通路在易感组中显着上调。接下来，综合组学分析表明炎症信号传导是关键的机制贡献者，并使用分子生物学测定进一步验证了这一点。进一步的免疫荧光染色显示，易感大鼠的 mPFC 中星形胶质细胞密度降低，交叉点减少的活化小胶质细胞增加。总体而言，这些发现表明 mPFC 中的神经炎症在易感雄性大鼠的行为和神经生物学变化中发挥着重要作用。

items.title: Prospective Validation of Multi-week Inpatient Census Forecasting for Pediatric HSCT and Cellular Therapy.
items.authors: Ezra Porter; Richard S Hanna; Timothy S Olson; Stephan A Grupp; Charles A Phillips; Stephan Kadauke
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Accurate inpatient census forecasting is important for cell therapy and blood and marrow transplantation (BMT) programs because bed capacity, staffing, and coordination of transplant care depend on anticipating occupancy several weeks in advance. Forecasting BMT census is challenging because the service combines planned admissions, including scheduled transplants, with less predictable admissions related to treatment complications. Existing literature has focused on shorter-term prediction, leaving limited evidence for forecasting over the 15- to 30-day horizons most relevant to BMT operational planning. We therefore developed a forecasting approach that reflects the operational structure of BMT care by modeling the distinct processes that determine census rather than treating census as a single time series. OBJECTIVE: To develop and prospectively validate a component-based model for forecasting pediatric hematopoietic cell transplantation and cellular therapy inpatient census 15 to 30 days in advance. STUDY DESIGN: We performed retrospective model development followed by prospective validation of a deployed forecasting workflow. The model decomposed future census into expected admissions and expected discharges. Forecasts of upcoming admissions were obtained by integrating known, planned transplant schedules with predicted, unplanned admissions estimated from historical admission patterns. For patients already hospitalized, discharge probabilities were estimated at the patient level using gradient-boosted decision trees. These components were combined to generate daily census forecasts over 15-, 30-, and longer-range horizons. Performance was assessed using forecast accuracy metrics including mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) and root mean squared error (RMSE). RESULTS: In retrospective evaluation, the component-based model achieved strong performance across clinically relevant forecast horizons. Accuracy was strongest at the most operationally useful intervals, with MAPE of 13% at 15 days and 16% at 30 days. These results suggest that integrating known transplant schedules with modeled unplanned admissions and patient-level discharge probabilities can provide accurate medium-range census forecasts for our overall BMT service. In prospective validation after deployment, performance remained stable in real-world use, confirming feasibility of routine operational forecasting and reducing concern for retrospective information leakage. CONCLUSIONS: Accurate 15- to 30-day inpatient census forecasting for pediatric hematopoietic stem cell transplantation (HSCT) and cellular therapy programs is achievable when models are integrated with transplant operational data and aligned with the mechanisms that drive occupancy. A component-based framework combining scheduled transplant data, modeled unplanned admissions, and patient-level discharge prediction performed well in both retrospective and prospective evaluation. This approach can support more reliable capacity planning for HSCT and cellular therapy programs and may be adaptable to other complex inpatient services with both planned and unplanned utilization.
items.title_en: Prospective Validation of Multi-week Inpatient Census Forecasting for Pediatric HSCT and Cellular Therapy.
items.title_cn: 儿科 HSCT 和细胞治疗的多周住院患者普查预测的前瞻性验证。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：准确的住院患者人口普查预测对于细胞治疗和血液和骨髓移植 (BMT) 计划非常重要，因为床位容量、人员配备和移植护理的协调取决于提前几周预测的占用情况。预测 BMT 普查具有挑战性，因为该服务将计划入院（包括预定的移植）与与治疗并发症相关的难以预测的入院结合起来。现有文献主要关注短期预测，对于与 BMT 运营规划最相关的 15 至 30 天范围内的预测留下的证据有限。因此，我们开发了一种预测方法，通过对决定人口普查的不同过程进行建模，而不是将人口普查视为单个时间序列，来反映 BMT 护理的运营结构。目的：开发并前瞻性验证基于组件的模型，用于提前 15 至 30 天预测儿科造血细胞移植和细胞治疗住院患者普查。研究设计：我们进行了回顾性模型开发，然后对已部署的预测工作流程进行了前瞻性验证。该模型将未来的人口普查分解为预期入院和预期出院。对即将入院的预测是通过将已知的、计划的移植时间表与根据历史入院模式估计的预测的、计划外的入院情况相结合而获得的。对于已经住院的患者，使用梯度提升决策树在患者层面估计出院概率。这些组件结合起来生成 15 年、30 年和更长期范围内的每日人口普查预测。使用预测准确性指标评估绩效，包括平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE) 和均方根误差 (RMSE)。结果：在回顾性评估中，基于组件的模型在临床相关预测范围内取得了强劲的表现。在最实用的时间间隔内，准确性最高，15 天时的 MAPE 为 13%，30 天时的 MAPE 为 16%。这些结果表明，将已知的移植计划与模拟的计划外入院和患者出院概率相结合……

items.title: ASCT, CAR T-cell, or Combined Consolidation for R/R PCNSL in Re-achieved CR: An Inverse Probability of Treatment Weighting-Adjusted Comparative Study.
items.authors: Fan Yang; Rui Liu; Zhonghua Fu; Danyang Li; Yuelu Guo; Lixia Ma; Miaomiao Cao; Biping Deng
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Chimeric antigen receptor (CAR) T-cell therapy has emerged as a promising strategy for treating relapsed or refractory primary central nervous system lymphoma (R/R PCNSL). While recent reports suggest that combined autologous stem cell transplantation (ASCT) and CAR T-cell therapy may offer superior efficacy over CAR T-cell monotherapy, direct comparative evidence evaluating these modalities against conventional ASCT as consolidation therapy for patients in complete remission (CR) remains scarce. AIM: To evaluate and compare the clinical efficacy and survival outcomes of three consolidation strategies-ASCT, CAR T-cell therapy, and ASCT combined with CAR T-cell therapy (ASCT+CAR-T)-in R/R PCNSL patients who re-achieved a CR. METHODS: This retrospective study analyzed 112 patients with R/R PCNSL who received consolidation therapy at Beijing GoBroad Hospital between April 2022 and November 2025.CAR T-cell therapy recipients were enrolled in the clinical trial ChiCTR2200058972. RESULTS: The median age of the cohort was 57 years (range: 25-75). Fourteen patients (12.5%) had received more than three prior lines of therapy, and 23.2% of the cohort presented with an IESLG score ≥ 3. For consolidation, 38 patients received CAR T-cell therapy, 42 underwent ASCT, and 32 received combined ASCT + CAR-T therapy. At a median follow-up of 21.4 months, the overall 2-year PFS and OS rates were 70.7% and 82.5%, respectively. In the sIPTW-adjusted analysis, the ASCT group demonstrated a significantly lower cumulative incidence of relapse compared to the CAR-T group (sHR=0.236, P=0.034) and the ASCT+CAR-T group (sHR=0.121, P=0.009). While ASCT showed a favorable trend in prolonging PFS over CAR-T (HR=0.384, P=0.072), no significant differences were observed in OS or 3-month CRR across the three cohorts. Safety was manageable. The most common causes of death were disease progression (58.8%) and infection (41.2%). CONCLUSION: For R/R PCNSL patients who have successfully re-achieved CR, ASCT monotherapy was associated with a lower cumulative incidence of relapse compared with CAR T-cell therapy or ASCT+CAR-T therapy. Given the retrospective nature of this study and potential residual confounding, these findings further prospective validation is required.
items.title_en: ASCT, CAR T-cell, or Combined Consolidation for R/R PCNSL in Re-achieved CR: An Inverse Probability of Treatment Weighting-Adjusted Comparative Study.
items.title_cn: ASCT、CAR T 细胞或 R/R PCNSL 联合巩固治疗重新获得 CR：治疗权重调整比较研究的逆概率。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：嵌合抗原受体 (CAR) T 细胞疗法已成为治疗复发或难治性原发性中枢神经系统淋巴瘤 (R/R PCNSL) 的有前景的策略。虽然最近的报告表明，自体干细胞移植 (ASCT) 和 CAR T 细胞联合疗法可能比 CAR T 细胞单一疗法提供更好的疗效，但评估这些疗法与传统 ASCT 作为完全缓解 (CR) 患者巩固疗法的直接比较证据仍然很少。目的：评估和比较三种巩固策略——ASCT、CAR T 细胞治疗和 ASCT 联合 CAR T 细胞治疗（ASCT+CAR-T）——在重新达到 CR 的 R/R PCNSL 患者中的临床疗效和生存结果。方法：本回顾性研究分析了2022年4月至2025年11月期间在北京高博医院接受巩固治疗的112例R/R PCNSL患者。CAR T细胞治疗接受者被纳入临床试验ChiCTR2200058972。结果：该队列的中位年龄为 57 岁（范围：25-75 岁）。 14 名患者 (12.5%) 之前接受过三种以上治疗，队列中 23.2% 的 IESLG 评分≥ 3。为了巩固，38 名患者接受了 CAR T 细胞治疗，42 名患者接受了 ASCT，32 名患者接受了 ASCT + CAR-T 联合治疗。中位随访时间为 21.4 个月，总体 2 年 PFS 和 OS 率分别为 70.7% 和 82.5%。在sIPTW调整分析中，与CAR-T组（sHR=0.236，P=0.034）和ASCT+CAR-T组（sHR=0.121，P=0.009）相比，ASCT组的累积复发率显着降低。虽然 ASCT 在延长 PFS 方面表现出优于 CAR-T 的有利趋势（HR=0.384，P=0.072），但三个队列中的 OS 或 3 个月 CRR 没有观察到显着差异。安全是可控的。最常见的死亡原因是疾病进展（58.8%）和感染（41.2%）。结论：对于成功重新达到 CR 的 R/R PCNSL 患者，与 CAR T 细胞治疗或 ASCT+CAR-T 治疗相比，ASCT 单药治疗的累积复发率较低。鉴于本研究的回顾性和潜力……

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：背景：嵌合抗原受体 (CAR) T 细胞疗法已成为治疗复发或难治性原发性中枢神经系统淋巴瘤 (R/R PCNSL) 的有前景的策略。虽然最近的报告表明，自体干细胞移植 (ASCT) 和 CAR T 细胞联合疗法可能比 CAR T 细胞单一疗法提供更好的疗效，但评估这些疗法与传统 ASCT 作为完全缓解 (CR) 患者巩固疗法的直接比较证据仍然很少。目的：评估和比较三种巩固策略——ASCT、CAR T 细胞治疗和 ASCT 联合 CAR T 细胞治疗（ASCT+CAR-T）——在重新达到 CR 的 R/R PCNSL 患者中的临床疗效和生存结果。方法：本回顾性研究分析了2022年4月至2025年11月期间在北京高博医院接受巩固治疗的112例R/R PCNSL患者。CAR T细胞治疗接受者被纳入临床试验ChiCTR2200058972。结果：该队列的中位年龄为 57 岁（范围：25-75 岁）。 14 名患者 (12.5%) 之前接受过三种以上治疗，队列中 23.2% 的 IESLG 评分≥ 3。为了巩固，38 名患者接受了 CAR T 细胞治疗，42 名患者接受了 ASCT，32 名患者接受了 ASCT + CAR-T 联合治疗。中位随访时间为 21.4 个月，总体 2 年 PFS 和 OS 率分别为 70.7% 和 82.5%。在sIPTW调整分析中，与CAR-T组（sHR=0.236，P=0.034）和ASCT+CAR-T组（sHR=0.121，P=0.009）相比，ASCT组的累积复发率显着降低。虽然 ASCT 在延长 PFS 方面表现出优于 CAR-T 的有利趋势（HR=0.384，P=0.072），但三个队列中的 OS 或 3 个月 CRR 没有观察到显着差异。安全是可控的。最常见的死亡原因是疾病进展（58.8%）和感染（41.2%）。结论：对于成功重新达到 CR 的 R/R PCNSL 患者，与 CAR T 细胞治疗或 ASCT+CAR-T 治疗相比，ASCT 单药治疗的累积复发率较低。鉴于本研究的回顾性和潜力……

items.title: 3D nanoscale imaging of amyloid-β oligomer interactions with extracellular vesicles by cryo-ET.
items.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.authors: Anum Khursheed; Qi Shang; Hui Zhang; Yao Tian; Piotr Szwedziak; Vladimir A Volkov; John H Viles
items.abstract: Central to Alzheimer's disease pathology are prefibrillar oligomer assemblies of amyloid-β (Aβ) peptide. A widely discussed hypothesis proposes that amyloid-β oligomers insert into neuronal lipid membranes, disrupting their integrity and causing a loss of cellular homeostasis in Alzheimer's disease. This membrane disruption is believed to be a major source of Aβ-induced neurotoxicity. Cryo electron tomography (cryo-ET) has facilitated 3D nanoscale imaging of Aβ-membrane interactions under near-native conditions. Analyses of small extracellular vesicles (sEVs) reveals that Aβ oligomers including annular and curvilinear extended oligomers (CLEOs) exhibit extensive binding to cell-derived lipid membranes, including insertion into and carpeting of the lipid bilayer. Notably, these oligomeric assemblies were also internalized and concentrated within the cell-derived exosomes and other small sEVs. Enrichment of Aβ oligomers within the vesicles typically ranged between 5 to 20 times the external Aβ levels depending on the vesicle size and curvature. In contrast, monomeric and fibrillar forms of Aβ displayed minimal membrane interaction. Once internalized CLEOs appear to be trapped in an oligomeric form and do not readily go on to form fibrils. Studies with vesicles of brain lipid extract indicate the Aβ internalization does not require the presence of a membrane protein. Our in vitro studies underscore the membrane-disruptive capacity of oligomeric Aβ species and suggest a role of sEVs in concentrating toxic Aβ oligomers and transporting oligomers across the brain interstitium.
items.title_en: 3D nanoscale imaging of amyloid-β oligomer interactions with extracellular vesicles by cryo-ET.
items.title_cn: 通过冷冻 ET 对淀粉样蛋白-β 寡聚物与细胞外囊泡相互作用进行 3D 纳米级成像。
items.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病病理学的核心是淀粉样蛋白-β (Aβ) 肽的前原纤维寡聚物组装体。一个广泛讨论的假设提出，β-淀粉样蛋白寡聚物插入神经元脂质膜中，破坏其完整性并导致阿尔茨海默病的细胞稳态丧失。这种膜破坏被认为是 Aβ 诱导的神经毒性的主要来源。冷冻电子断层扫描 (cryo-ET) 促进了在接近天然条件下对 Aβ 膜相互作用进行 3D 纳米级成像。对小细胞外囊泡 (sEV) 的分析表明，包括环形和曲线延伸寡聚物 (CLEO) 在内的 Aβ 寡聚物表现出与细胞来源的脂质膜的广泛结合，包括插入和覆盖脂质双层。值得注意的是，这些寡聚体组装体也被内化并集中在细胞来源的外泌体和其他小型 sEV 中。囊泡内 Aβ 寡聚物的富集通常为外部 Aβ 水平的 5 至 20 倍，具体取决于囊泡的大小和曲率。相比之下，Aβ 的单体和纤维形式表现出最小的膜相互作用。一旦内化，CLEO 似乎被困在寡聚形式中，并且不容易继续形成原纤维。对脑脂质提取物囊泡的研究表明，Aβ 内化不需要膜蛋白的存在。我们的体外研究强调了寡聚 Aβ 物种的膜破坏能力，并表明 sEV 在浓缩有毒 Aβ 寡聚体和跨脑间质运输寡聚体方面发挥作用。

items.title: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
items.authors: Yunchang Yang; XiangXiang Cao; Nan Feng; Xinyao Kang; Yaofeng Wang; Yunqin Sun
items.abstract: Glioblastoma (GBM) is defined by extreme lethality and transcriptomic plasticity, but the signatures driving the most aggressive tumors remain incompletely defined. In this exploratory in silico study, TCGA-GBM patients were stratified using a strict 1-year overall survival threshold. We integrated differential expression analysis, WGCNA, single-cell RNA-seq, spatial transcriptomics, and virtual knockout simulations. A high-risk signature centered on CCL2 and TIMP1 was identified. Single-cell and spatial mapping linked these genes to an inflammatory, macrophage-enriched microenvironment. The signature inversely correlated with neuronal synapse mimicry scores, suggesting that extreme aggressiveness involves a macroscopic shift from differentiated neuronal states toward an undifferentiated inflammatory phenotype. Virtual perturbation modeling confirmed CCL2 and TIMP1 as highly interconnected network hubs. Despite limitations inherent to computational and retrospective cohorts, our rigorous multi-omics validation identifies the CCL2/TIMP1 axis as a driver of potential prognostic indicator. These findings generate the hypothesis that these mediators reflect a critical inflammatory, mesenchymal-like tumor microenvironment shift, warranting independent cohort validation and experimental investigation.
items.title_en: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
items.title_cn: 探索性多组学将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴与胶质母细胞瘤中的免疫抑制 TME 联系起来。
items.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 的定义是极高的致死率和转录组可塑性，但驱动最具侵袭性肿瘤的特征仍未完全确定。在这项探索性计算机研究中，TCGA-GBM 患者使用严格的 1 年总生存阈值进行分层。我们集成了差异表达分析、WGCNA、单细胞 RNA-seq、空间转录组学和虚拟敲除模拟。确定了以 CCL2 和 TIMP1 为中心的高风险特征。单细胞和空间图谱将这些基因与富含巨噬细胞的炎症微环境联系起来。该特征与神经元突触拟态评分呈负相关，表明极端攻击性涉及从分化的神经元状态向未分化的炎症表型的宏观转变。虚拟扰动模型证实 CCL2 和 TIMP1 是高度互连的网络中心。尽管计算和回顾性队列存在固有的局限性，但我们严格的多组学验证将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴确定为潜在预后指标的驱动因素。这些发现产生了这样的假设：这些介质反映了关键的炎症性、间质样肿瘤微环境的转变，需要独立的队列验证和实验研究。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: CSF1R inhibition exacerbates gamma oscillation disruption and induces network hyperexcitability in APP/PS1 mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Hugh J Delaney; Sadia Islam; Dáire Healy; Ross Oglesby; Meghamsh Konda; Gudo M Rietman; Rebecca Lynch; Arshed Nazmi
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's Disease is the most common neurodegenerative disease worldwide, but significant gaps in pathophysiological understanding have hampered development of disease-modifying therapies. In Alzheimer's disease, neurophysiological function is impaired, with gamma frequency oscillations - thought to be essential for higher-order cognitive processes - disrupted in both patients and animal models. However, the mechanisms driving these disruptions are unclear and, in particular, the role of neuroinflammation in these changes is poorly understood. In this study, we investigated neuronal network dynamics in acute brain slices from APP/PS1 transgenic mice. Gamma frequency oscillations had significantly reduced amplitude in APP/PS1 brain slices at 9-11 months, accompanied by an increase in beta frequency power and heightened epileptiform activity. This is suggestive of a slowing in neuronal oscillations, considered a neurophysiological hallmark of Alzheimer's disease. Immunohistochemical analysis revealed a reduction in parvalbumin- and somatostatin-positive inhibitory interneuron populations. Treatment with gabazine demonstrated increased network sensitivity to GABAA receptor antagonism, further indicating compromised inhibitory control in APP/PS1. As these altered oscillatory dynamics correlated with microglial reactivity, we hypothesised a causal role for microglia. Administration of the CSF1R inhibitor GW2580 reduced microglial proliferation, attenuated development of the disease-associated microglial phenotype and partially rescued synaptic loss; but, had no significant impact on amyloid plaque burden or cognitive deficits. Unexpectedly, GW2580 treatment exacerbated neuronal network hyperactivity and the incidence and complexity of epileptiform activity. Microglia in GW2580-treated mice showed reduced CD68 expression and decreased engulfment of synaptic elements, potentially facilitating the persistence of hyperexcitable synapses. These findings support a role of microglia in regulating neuronal network homeostasis and caution against indiscriminate suppression of microglial activity in Alzheimer's disease. Therapeutic strategies targeting microglia must account for their homeostatic functions to avoid adverse effects on neuronal network stability.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: CSF1R inhibition exacerbates gamma oscillation disruption and induces network hyperexcitability in APP/PS1 mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: CSF1R 抑制会加剧 APP/PS1 小鼠的 γ 振荡破坏并诱导网络过度兴奋。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默氏病是全世界最常见的神经退行性疾病，但病理生理学理解上的巨大差距阻碍了疾病缓解疗法的发展。在阿尔茨海默病中，神经生理功能受损，伽马频率振荡（被认为对高阶认知过程至关重要）在患者和动物模型中都受到干扰。然而，驱动这些破坏的机制尚不清楚，特别是神经炎症在这些变化中的作用知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们研究了 APP/PS1 转基因小鼠急性脑切片的神经元网络动力学。 9-11 个月时，APP/PS1 脑切片中的伽马频率振荡幅度显着降低，同时伴随着贝塔频率功率的增加和癫痫样活动的增强。这表明神经元振荡减慢，被认为是阿尔茨海默病的神经生理学标志。免疫组织化学分析显示小白蛋白和生长抑素阳性抑制性中间神经元群体减少。加巴嗪治疗表明网络对 GABAA 受体拮抗作用的敏感性增加，进一步表明 APP/PS1 的抑制控制受损。由于这些改变的振荡动力学与小胶质细胞反应性相关，我们假设小胶质细胞具有因果作用。使用 CSF1R 抑制剂 GW2580 可减少小胶质细胞增殖，减弱疾病相关小胶质细胞表型的发育，并部分挽救突触损失；但是，对淀粉样斑块负担或认知缺陷没有显着影响。出乎意料的是，GW2580 治疗加剧了神经元网络过度活跃以及癫痫样活动的发生率和复杂性。 GW2580 治疗小鼠的小胶质细胞显示 CD68 表达减少，突触元件吞噬减少，可能促进过度兴奋突触的持续存在。这些发现支持小胶质细胞在调节神经元网络稳态中的作用，并警告不要不加区别地抑制阿尔茨海默病中的小胶质细胞活动。针对小胶质细胞的治疗策略必须考虑……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Immunotherapy with a short-lived anti-PD-L1 antibody in Alzheimer's disease: a phase 1b, randomized, double-blind trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Tommaso Croese; Catherine J Mummery; Noa Bregman; Dalia Bracha; Kuti Baruch; Alexander Kertser; Sharona Raveh; Eliezer Shochat
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: While Alzheimer's disease (AD) is initiated by amyloid plaque accumulation, its progression involves local neuroinflammation that the brain cannot resolve when age-related dysfunction of the systemic immune system limits peripheral immune support. Preclinical studies using rodent models showed that transient systemic blockade of programmed death-ligand 1 is associated with reduced neuroinflammation, neuroprotection and attenuation of disease progression. Based on the underlying mechanism, a new short-lived anti-programmed death-ligand 1 antibody with Fc-effector silencing and reduced FcRn binding (IBC-Ab002) was engineered. Here, we report a randomized, double-blind, phase 1b first-in-human trial in early AD, with safety and tolerability as the primary endpoint. Forty participants were enrolled across five ascending dose cohorts (1-30 mg kg-1), with dosing administered four times at 3-month intervals. Treatment was well tolerated, with no treatment-related serious adverse events or evidence of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities. Exploratory analyses at week 48 showed directional changes in cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers of neuronal and synaptic damage favoring the 30 mg kg-1 dose, although no doses reached statistical significance given the limited sample size. The safety and tolerability profile supports further clinical development of systemic, intermittently administered IBC-Ab002 in early AD. ClinicalTrials.gov registration: NCT05551741 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Immunotherapy with a short-lived anti-PD-L1 antibody in Alzheimer's disease: a phase 1b, randomized, double-blind trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 使用短效抗 PD-L1 抗体治疗阿尔茨海默病的免疫疗法：1b 期、随机、双盲试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 虽然阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是由淀粉样斑块积聚引发的，但其进展涉及局部神经炎症，当与年龄相关的全身免疫系统功能障碍限制外周免疫支持时，大脑无法解决这种炎症。使用啮齿动物模型进行的临床前研究表明，程序性死亡配体 1 的短暂全身阻断与神经炎症的减少、神经保护和疾病进展的减缓有关。基于潜在机制，设计了一种具有 Fc 效应子沉默和 FcRn 结合减少的新型短寿命抗程序性死亡配体 1 抗体 (IBC-Ab002)。在这里，我们报告了一项针对早期 AD 的随机、双盲、1b 期首次人体试验，以安全性和耐受性作为主要终点。 40 名参与者被纳入 5 个剂量递增队列（1-30 mg kg-1），每 3 个月给药 4 次。治疗耐受性良好，没有与治疗相关的严重不良事件或淀粉样蛋白相关成像异常的证据。第 48 周的探索性分析显示，神经元和突触损伤的脑脊液生物标志物发生方向性变化，有利于 30 mg kg-1 剂量，但考虑到样本量有限，没有任何剂量达到统计学显着性。安全性和耐受性概况支持在早期 AD 中系统性、间歇性给药 IBC-Ab002 的进一步临床开发。 ClinicalTrials.gov 注册：NCT05551741。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Recent Advances and Future Prospects in Gene Delivery Platforms for Glioblastoma: A Review.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Alexander F Haddad; Rithvik Ramesh; Jorge Armando Peña Agudelo; Christopher Salha; Pranav Prakash; Shreya R Aghi; James S Trippett; Maria G Castro
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Glioblastoma (GBM) remains a disease with high mortality despite treatment with maximal safe surgical resection, radiation, and temozolomide. Standard of care for GBM has remained unchanged for decades. Gene therapies using both viral and nonviral platforms have the potential to significantly improve outcomes but have faced challenges related to delivery, intratumoral heterogeneity, and immunologic limitations. OBSERVATIONS: This review discusses the most recent progress in genetic therapies for gliomas, with a focus on clinical platforms and those nearing clinical translation. Oncolytic and nonlytic replicating viral therapies remain the most clinically advanced, with adeno-associated virus and nonviral systems approaching clinical translation. Treatment efficacy has been variable across trials, platforms, and payloads. Oncolytic herpes simplex virus (G47Δ, teserpaturev) has been conditionally approved for the treatment of gliomas in Japan, while next-generation constructs show a potential association between immunologic activation and survival. Common challenges include the verification and quantification of delivery efficiency, the balance between antivector and antitumor immunity, appropriately designed clinical trials, relevant modeling of vector behavior in the preclinical setting, regulatory clearance, and manufacturing. CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: Understanding the potential and limitations of gene therapies for gliomas is vital in navigating the path forward for these promising therapies. The future of these treatments will focus on improved clinical trial design with rapid confirmation and tracking of delivery, biomarker feedback and assay optimization, and combination strategies. A focus on delivery platform development can compress iteration cycles and lead to therapeutic benefit for patients with gliomas and other solid tumors.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Recent Advances and Future Prospects in Gene Delivery Platforms for Glioblastoma: A Review.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤基因传递平台的最新进展和未来前景：综述。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 重要性：尽管采用最大程度安全的手术切除、放疗和替莫唑胺进行治疗，胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 仍然是一种死亡率较高的疾病。 GBM 的护理标准几十年来一直保持不变。使用病毒和非病毒平台的基因疗法有可能显着改善结果，但面临与递送、瘤内异质性和免疫学限制相关的挑战。观察：这篇综述讨论了神经胶质瘤基因治疗的最新进展，重点是临床平台和接近临床转化的平台。溶瘤和非裂解复制病毒疗法仍然是临床上最先进的，腺相关病毒和非病毒系统已接近临床转化。治疗效果因试验、平台和有效负载而异。溶瘤单纯疱疹病毒（G47Δ，teserpaturev）已在日本有条件批准用于治疗神经胶质瘤，而下一代构建体显示出免疫激活和生存之间的潜在关联。常见的挑战包括传递效率的验证和量化、抗载体和抗肿瘤免疫之间的平衡、适当设计的临床试验、临床前环境中载体行为的相关建模、监管许可和制造。结论和相关性：了解神经胶质瘤基因疗法的潜力和局限性对于探索这些有前途的疗法的前进道路至关重要。这些治疗的未来将侧重于改进临床试验设计，包括快速确认和跟踪给药、生物标志物反馈和测定优化以及组合策略。专注于交付平台开发可以压缩迭代周期，并为神经胶质瘤和其他实体瘤患者带来治疗益处。

英文题目：Recent Advances and Future Prospects in Gene Delivery Platforms for Glioblastoma: A Review.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：重要性：尽管采用最大程度安全的手术切除、放疗和替莫唑胺进行治疗，胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 仍然是一种死亡率较高的疾病。 GBM 的护理标准几十年来一直保持不变。使用病毒和非病毒平台的基因疗法有可能显着改善结果，但面临与递送、瘤内异质性和免疫学限制相关的挑战。观察：这篇综述讨论了神经胶质瘤基因治疗的最新进展，重点是临床平台和接近临床转化的平台。溶瘤和非裂解复制病毒疗法仍然是临床上最先进的，腺相关病毒和非病毒系统已接近临床转化。治疗效果因试验、平台和有效负载而异。溶瘤单纯疱疹病毒（G47Δ，teserpaturev）已在日本有条件批准用于治疗神经胶质瘤，而下一代构建体显示出免疫激活和生存之间的潜在关联。常见的挑战包括传递效率的验证和量化、抗载体和抗肿瘤免疫之间的平衡、适当设计的临床试验、临床前环境中载体行为的相关建模、监管许可和制造。结论和相关性：了解神经胶质瘤基因疗法的潜力和局限性对于探索这些有前途的疗法的前进道路至关重要。这些治疗的未来将侧重于改进临床试验设计，包括快速确认和跟踪给药、生物标志物反馈和测定优化以及组合策略。专注于交付平台开发可以压缩迭代周期，并为神经胶质瘤和其他实体瘤患者带来治疗益处。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

小满点评：这是一条需要人工复核全文的候选文献，当前摘要层面不宜过度外推。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: G Paul; H Bjartmarz; A Kirkeby; J Nelander; R Smith; S Kayhanian; A Evans; B Harry
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is characterized by progressive loss of nigral dopaminergic neurons, resulting in disabling motor symptoms. Intracerebral transplantation of stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitors to replace lost endogenous dopaminergic neurons offers a new potentially restorative therapeutic approach for PD. Here we report the 12-month primary safety end point and interim efficacy outcomes from a phase 1/2, open-label, multicenter trial evaluating STEM-PD, a cryopreserved, off-the-shelf dopaminergic progenitor product derived from human pluripotent stem cells. Eight individuals with moderate PD underwent bilateral intraputaminal transplantation at two escalating doses (n = 4 per cohort), followed by 12 months of immunosuppression. Seven participants completed 12-month follow-up; one participant died from a pulmonary infection. No serious adverse events were attributed to the cell product, no graft-induced dyskinesias were observed and serial magnetic resonance imaging showed no evidence of tumor formation. These findings support the feasibility and favorable safety profile of human pluripotent stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitor transplantation in this early-phase study, with risks primarily associated with the immunosuppression regimen. Ongoing follow-up to 36 months will further evaluate durability, clinical outcomes and graft function. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT05635409 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类胚胎干细胞衍生的多巴胺能细胞治疗帕金森病：1/2 期开放标签试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 帕金森病 (PD) 的特点是黑质多巴胺能神经元逐渐丧失，导致运动障碍症状。脑内移植干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞来替代丢失的内源性多巴胺能神经元，为帕金森病提供了一种新的潜在恢复治疗方法。在此，我们报告了一项 1/2 期、开放标签、多中心试验的 12 个月主要安全终点和中期疗效结果，该试验评估了 STEM-PD，这是一种源自人类多能干细胞的冷冻保存、现成的多巴胺能祖细胞产品。 8 名中度 PD 患者接受了两次递增剂量的双侧壳核内移植（每组 n = 4 例），然后接受 12 个月的免疫抑制。 7 名参与者完成了 12 个月的随访；一名参与者死于肺部感染。细胞产物没有引起严重的不良事件，没有观察到移植物引起的运动障碍，并且连续磁共振成像没有显示肿瘤形成的证据。这些发现支持了这项早期研究中人类多能干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞移植的可行性和良好的安全性，其风险主要与免疫抑制方案相关。持续随访 36 个月将进一步评估耐久性、临床结果和移植功能。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT05635409。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Cell-type signatures of Alzheimer's disease shared across population groups.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Tain Luquez; Jonathan Algoo; Rebecca Chiu; Jason A Mares; Archana Yadav; Matti Lam; Pallavi Gaur; Xiaoying Lai
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Genomic studies at single-cell resolution have identified several cell types associated with clinical and pathological traits in Alzheimer's disease1-9, but have not examined associations that are shared across populations. To bridge this gap, here we use single-nucleus RNA sequencing and assay for transposase-accessible chromatin with sequencing to profile cortical and subcortical regions in post-mortem brain-tissue samples from Latin, white (excluding Latin) and African American (excluding Latin) individuals. Using discrete and continuous dissections of molecular programs, we identify cell-type-specific clusters associated with Alzheimer's disease in a region-specific manner across all three population groups, including microglial (GPNMB+ and CD74+ subgroups), astrocytic (SERPINH1+, CD44+ and WIF1+ subgroups) and neuronal (SST+ GABAergic and superficial-layer glutamatergic) signatures. We also report continuous gene-expression factors in astrocytes and oligodendrocytes that are not captured by discrete cluster assignments, but which show strong associations with disease phenotypes; these factors are enriched for genes associated with annotated functions such as lipid processing and neurotransmitter reuptake. Finally, we find that molecular programs reveal six distinct subgroups of individuals with cognitive impairment that span all three populations, are not captured by neuropathology, and are instead distinguished by molecular signatures that are not universally present but are nonetheless associated with ante-mortem impairment. Overall, our study identifies key cell types and gene programs implicated in Alzheimer's disease that are shared across population groups, and underscores how representative sampling can capture both shared signatures and disease heterogeneity, thereby enabling better prioritization of key cell types for further investigation.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Cell-type signatures of Alzheimer's disease shared across population groups.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 阿尔茨海默病的细胞类型特征在不同人群中是相同的。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 单细胞分辨率的基因组研究已经确定了与阿尔茨海默病临床和病理特征相关的几种细胞类型1-9，但尚未检查人群之间共有的关联。为了弥补这一差距，我们在这里使用单核 RNA 测序和转座酶可及染色质分析来分析拉丁裔、白人（不包括拉丁裔）和非裔美国人（不包括拉丁裔）个体死后脑组织样本中的皮质和皮质下区域。通过对分子程序的离散和连续剖析，我们以区域特异性方式在所有三个人群中识别出与阿尔茨海默病相关的细胞类型特异性簇，包括小胶质细胞（GPNMB+和CD74+亚组）、星形细胞（SERPINH1+、CD44+和WIF1+亚组）和神经元（SST+GABA能和浅层谷氨酸能）特征。我们还报告了星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞中的连续基因表达因子，这些因子未被离散的聚类分配捕获，但显示出与疾病表型的强烈关联；这些因子富含与注释功能相关的基因，例如脂质加工和神经递质再摄取。最后，我们发现分子程序揭示了跨越所有三个人群的六个不同的认知障碍个体亚组，这些亚组并未被神经病理学捕获，而是通过分子特征来区分，这些分子特征并不普遍存在，但仍然与生前损伤相关。总体而言，我们的研究确定了与阿尔茨海默病相关的关键细胞类型和基因程序，这些细胞类型和基因程序在不同人群中共享，并强调代表性抽样如何能够捕获共享特征和疾病异质性，从而能够更好地优先考虑关键细胞类型以进行进一步研究。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Cross-cohort analysis of expression and splicing quantitative trait loci in TOPMed.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Peter Orchard; Thomas W Blackwell; Linda Kachuri; Peter J Castaldi; Michael H Cho; Stephanie A Christenson; Peter Durda; Stacey Gabriel
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Most genetic variants associated with complex traits are hypothesized to regulate gene expression. To understand the genetics underlying gene expression variability, we characterized 14,324 RNA-sequencing samples from the Trans-Omics for Precision Medicine program and performed expression and splicing quantitative trait locus (e/sQTL) analyses in six tissues and cell types, including whole blood (n = 6454) and lung (n = 1291). We detected tens of thousands of secondary cis-e/sQTLs, showing that secondary cis-e/sQTL discovery remains unsaturated. We fine-mapped UK Biobank-derived genome-wide association study (GWAS) signals from 164 traits and identified e/sQTL colocalizations for 10,611 GWAS signals, including 7096 that colocalize with secondary e/sQTLs. Our results suggest that even larger e/sQTL analyses will uncover additional secondary e/sQTLs, further benefiting GWAS interpretation.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Cross-cohort analysis of expression and splicing quantitative trait loci in TOPMed.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: TOPMed 中表达和剪接数量性状位点的跨队列分析。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 大多数与复杂性状相关的遗传变异被假设为调节基因表达。为了了解基因表达变异性背后的遗传学原理，我们对来自 Trans-Omics for Precision Medicine 项目的 14,324 个 RNA 测序样本进行了表征，并在六种组织和细胞类型中进行了表达和剪接数量性状位点 (e/sQTL) 分析，包括全血 (n = 6454) 和肺 (n = 1291)。我们检测到了数以万计的次级 cis-e/sQTL，表明次级 cis-e/sQTL 的发现仍然不饱和。我们对来自英国生物银行的 164 个性状的全基因组关联研究 (GWAS) 信号进行了精细绘图，并确定了 10,611 个 GWAS 信号的 e/sQTL 共定位，其中包括 7096 个与次级 e/sQTL 共定位的信号。我们的结果表明，更大规模的 e/sQTL 分析将发现更多的次级 e/sQTL，进一步有利于 GWAS 解释。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: A Bayesian framework for longitudinal EHR and genetic discovery.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Sarah M Urbut; Yi Ding; Tetsushi Nakao; Satoshi Koyama; Anika Misra; Xilin Jiang; Achyutha Harish; Leslie Gaffney
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Electronic health records (EHRs) provide rich longitudinal disease histories, but existing methods for analysing these data typically treat diseases in isolation1 and rarely integrate germline genetics. Here we present ALADYNOULLI, a Bayesian generative framework that jointly models longitudinal EHR diagnoses, age and polygenic risk to recover latent time-varying disease signatures and patient-specific signature loadings; the model is formulated as a mixture of probabilities rather than a probability of a mixture2, correctly accommodating simultaneous and chronic conditions. Applied to three independent biobanks (UK Biobank3, Mass General Brigham4 and All of Us; total n > 683,000) spanning up to 52 years of follow-up and 348 diseases, the model recovers 21 replicable signatures with high cross-cohort composition preservation (median of 80%) and reveals biological subtypes within diagnostic categories (Cohen's d up to 4.25; P ≤ 1 × 10-8 for 95% of comparisons). Signatures are concordant with established disease biology: carriers of familial hypercholesterolaemia5 enrich in the cardiovascular signature; carriers of clonal haematopoiesis of indeterminate potential6 in the inflammation signature; and a rare variant burden in LDLR, TTN and BRCA2 (refs. 7,8) aligns with disease specificities. A signature-based genome-wide association study identifies 151 genome-wide significant loci including cardiovascular associations missed by single-trait analyses. An explicit likelihood enables inverse probability weighting for selection bias9 while preserving biological signal. For disease prediction, ALADYNOULLI outperforms Pooled Cohort Equation (PCE), PREVENT and Gail at 1-year and 10-year horizons; disease-level (PheCode) predictions complement code-level foundation models such as Delphi-2M (ref. 10).
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: A Bayesian framework for longitudinal EHR and genetic discovery.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 用于纵向 EHR 和基因发现的贝叶斯框架。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 电子健康记录 (EHR) 提供了丰富的纵向疾病史，但分析这些数据的现有方法通常单独治疗疾病1，很少整合种系遗传学。在这里，我们提出了 ALADYNOULLI，一个贝叶斯生成框架，它联合模拟纵向 EHR 诊断、年龄和多基因风险，以恢复潜在的随时间变化的疾病特征和患者特定的特征负荷；该模型被表述为概率的混合，而不是混合的概率2，正确地适应同时发生和慢性的情况。该模型应用于三个独立生物库（UK Biobank3、Mass General Brigham4 和 All of Us；总数 > 683,000），随访时间长达 52 年，涵盖 348 种疾病，恢复了 21 个可复制的特征，具有高跨队列成分保留（中位数为 80%），并揭示了诊断类别内的生物亚型（Cohen's d 高达 4.25；P ≤ 1 × 95% 的比较为 10-8）。特征与已确定的疾病生物学一致：家族性高胆固醇血症5携带者的心血管特征丰富；炎症特征中具有不确定潜力6的克隆造血的携带者； LDLR、TTN 和 BRCA2 中的罕见变异负担（参考文献 7,8）与疾病特异性一致。一项基于特征的全基因组关联研究确定了 151 个全基因组重要位点，包括单性状分析遗漏的心血管关联。显式似然可以对选择偏差进行逆概率加权，同时保留生物信号。对于疾病预测，ALADYNOULLI 在 1 年和 10 年范围内优于合并队列方程 (PCE)、PREVENT 和 Gail；疾病级别 (PheCode) 预测补充了代码级别基础模型，例如 Delphi-2M（参考文献 10）。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: CD4
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Kjetil Bjornevik; João Vitor Mahler; Philippe A Bilodeau; Brit Ellen Rød; Gabriela Romanow; Takahisa Mikami; Monique Anderson; Natasha Bobrowski-Khoury
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) pathogenesis is linked to Epstein-Barr virus (EBV), but the underlying immune mechanisms remain unclear. Using an optimized T cell assay, we demonstrate that CD4+ T cells from individuals with MS predominantly target EBV viral particle components, specifically the late lytic capsid and glycoprotein antigens, rather than latent antigens. In contrast, the Epstein-Barr nuclear antigen 1 (EBNA1) primarily activated CD8+ T cells. EBV-specific CD4+ T cell responses were twofold higher in individuals with untreated MS compared with healthy controls, whereas responses to other herpesviruses remained similar. Anti-CD20 therapy initiation in treatment-naïve participants reduced these responses, a finding validated in an independent cohort, and eliminated viral shedding in saliva. Our results establish preferential CD4+ T cell reactivity to EBV late lytic antigens as a key feature of MS, providing a framework for developing EBV-targeted therapies, including vaccines and antivirals.
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 多发性硬化症 (MS) 发病机制与 Epstein-Barr 病毒 (EBV) 有关，但潜在的免疫机制仍不清楚。使用优化的 T 细胞测定，我们证明来自 MS 个体的 CD4+ T 细胞主要靶向 EBV 病毒颗粒成分，特别是晚期裂解衣壳和糖蛋白抗原，而不是潜在抗原。相比之下，Epstein-Barr 核抗原 1 (EBNA1) 主要激活 CD8+ T 细胞。与健康对照相比，未经治疗的多发性硬化症患者的 EBV 特异性 CD4+ T 细胞反应高出两倍，而对其他疱疹病毒的反应仍然相似。未经治疗的参与者开始抗 CD20 治疗可减少这些反应，这一发现在独立队列中得到验证，并消除了唾液中的病毒脱落。我们的结果确立了 CD4+ T 细胞对 EBV 晚期裂解抗原的优先反应性是 MS 的一个关键特征，为开发 EBV 靶向疗法（包括疫苗和抗病毒药物）提供了框架。

global_hot_topics.title: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Yunchang Yang; XiangXiang Cao; Nan Feng; Xinyao Kang; Yaofeng Wang; Yunqin Sun
global_hot_topics.abstract: Glioblastoma (GBM) is defined by extreme lethality and transcriptomic plasticity, but the signatures driving the most aggressive tumors remain incompletely defined. In this exploratory in silico study, TCGA-GBM patients were stratified using a strict 1-year overall survival threshold. We integrated differential expression analysis, WGCNA, single-cell RNA-seq, spatial transcriptomics, and virtual knockout simulations. A high-risk signature centered on CCL2 and TIMP1 was identified. Single-cell and spatial mapping linked these genes to an inflammatory, macrophage-enriched microenvironment. The signature inversely correlated with neuronal synapse mimicry scores, suggesting that extreme aggressiveness involves a macroscopic shift from differentiated neuronal states toward an undifferentiated inflammatory phenotype. Virtual perturbation modeling confirmed CCL2 and TIMP1 as highly interconnected network hubs. Despite limitations inherent to computational and retrospective cohorts, our rigorous multi-omics validation identifies the CCL2/TIMP1 axis as a driver of potential prognostic indicator. These findings generate the hypothesis that these mediators reflect a critical inflammatory, mesenchymal-like tumor microenvironment shift, warranting independent cohort validation and experimental investigation.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 探索性多组学将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴与胶质母细胞瘤中的免疫抑制 TME 联系起来。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 的定义是极高的致死率和转录组可塑性，但驱动最具侵袭性肿瘤的特征仍未完全确定。在这项探索性计算机研究中，TCGA-GBM 患者使用严格的 1 年总生存阈值进行分层。我们集成了差异表达分析、WGCNA、单细胞 RNA-seq、空间转录组学和虚拟敲除模拟。确定了以 CCL2 和 TIMP1 为中心的高风险特征。单细胞和空间图谱将这些基因与富含巨噬细胞的炎症微环境联系起来。该特征与神经元突触拟态评分呈负相关，表明极端攻击性涉及从分化的神经元状态向未分化的炎症表型的宏观转变。虚拟扰动模型证实 CCL2 和 TIMP1 是高度互连的网络中心。尽管计算和回顾性队列存在固有的局限性，但我们严格的多组学验证将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴确定为潜在预后指标的驱动因素。这些发现产生了这样的假设：这些介质反映了关键的炎症性、间质样肿瘤微环境的转变，需要独立的队列验证和实验研究。

global_hot_topics.title: Gut microbiota-nanoparticle interactions in Parkinson's disease: mechanistic insights and therapeutic perspective.
global_hot_topics.abstract: OBJECTIVE: This review introduces the 'nanomaterial-microbiome-brain interface' as a conceptual framework uniting three systems: gut microbiota, nanoparticles, and neurodegeneration. MAIN FINDINGS: We synthesize evidence showing that titanium dioxide, silver, and zinc oxide nanoparticles differentially alter microbial composition. These microbial shifts intersect with established gut-brain mechanisms, including short-chain fatty acid production and immune modulation, providing plausible pathways linking nanomaterial exposure to neurological outcomes. CONCLUSION: We propose the 'nanomaterial-microbiome-brain interface' as a novel conceptual framework with twofold relevance-serving both as a potential contributor to Parkinson's disease pathogenesis through unintentional environmental exposure, and as an underexplored avenue for therapeutic intervention. Critical knowledge gaps persist. Addressing these gaps will require integrated approaches that bridge nanomaterial research, microbiome science, and neurodegeneration studies.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Gut microbiota-nanoparticle interactions in Parkinson's disease: mechanistic insights and therapeutic perspective.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 帕金森病中肠道微生物群-纳米颗粒的相互作用：机制见解和治疗视角。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：这篇综述介绍了“纳米材料-微生物组-大脑界面”作为联合三个系统的概念框架：肠道微生物群、纳米颗粒和神经变性。主要发现：我们综合的证据表明，二氧化钛、银和氧化锌纳米粒子对微生物组成有不同的改变。这些微生物的变化与已建立的肠脑机制相交叉，包括短链脂肪酸的产生和免疫调节，提供了将纳米材料暴露与神经系统结果联系起来的合理途径。结论：我们提出“纳米材料-微生物组-大脑界面”作为一种具有双重相关性的新颖概念框架——既可以通过无意的环境暴露作为帕金森病发病机制的潜在贡献者，又可以作为治疗干预的尚未充分探索的途径。关键的知识差距依然存在。解决这些差距需要综合方法，将纳米材料研究、微生物组科学和神经退行性研究联系起来。

global_hot_topics.title: A novel deep learning approach for privacy-preserving encoded EEG-based brain-computer interfaces with clinical LLM applications.
global_hot_topics.authors: Taslima Khanam; Siuly Siuly; Kate Wang; Hua Wang
global_hot_topics.abstract: PURPOSE: The rise of large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-4 and DeepSeek has transformed healthcare information processing by enabling natural language-based clinical reasoning. However, the integration of LLMs with privacy-sensitive biomedical signals, particularly electroencephalogram (EEG) data used in brain-computer interface (BCI) systems, remains underexplored. EEG signals, especially during motor imagery (MI) tasks, are critical for assistive neurotechnologies but pose significant privacy risks due to their capacity to reveal cognitive and medical information. Traditional encryption techniques often distort signal structure or require decryption with additional noise, compromising classification performance and real-time usability. METHODS: To address this gap, we propose a deep denoising structure-preserving neural encoding network (DSNet) that enables accurate classification of privacy-preserving encoded EEG representations without requiring decryption. EEG features were extracted using common spatial pattern (CSP) and transformed into privacy-preserving encoded representations while preserving their statistical structure. Here, encoding refers to a non-reversible neural transformation designed for privacy preservation rather than a formal cryptographic guarantee. Two deep learning architectures, a feedforward neural network (NN) and a recurrent neural network (RNN), were evaluated for classification in the encoded feature space. Furthermore, we integrated an LLM (GPT-4) to generate clinical-style summaries based on model outputs, enhancing interpretability for clinician review and potential clinical support use. RESULTS AND CONCLUSION: Using publicly available datasets, DSNet-NN achieved over 87% accuracy for every subject, outperforming both the RNN variant and baseline models. It also demonstrated resilience to simulated privacy attacks. LLM-generated reports provided clinician-friendly interpretations of MI predictions, supporting potential real-world applicability. This study introduces an AI framework that bridges privacy-preserving EEG decoding with LLM-based clinical reasoning, offering a practical solution for privacy-preserving neurorehabilitation and digital health systems.
global_hot_topics.title_en: A novel deep learning approach for privacy-preserving encoded EEG-based brain-computer interfaces with clinical LLM applications.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于隐私保护编码的基于脑电图的脑机接口与临床法学硕士应用程序。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：GPT-4 和 DeepSeek 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 的兴起通过实现基于自然语言的临床推理，改变了医疗保健信息处理。然而，法学硕士与隐私敏感的生物医学信号的整合，特别是脑机接口（BCI）系统中使用的脑电图（EEG）数据的整合仍有待探索。脑电图信号，尤其是在运动想象 (MI) 任务期间，对于辅助神经技术至关重要，但由于其揭示认知和医疗信息的能力，会带来重大的隐私风险。传统的加密技术通常会扭曲信号结构或需要使用额外噪声进行解密，从而损害分类性能和实时可用性。方法：为了解决这一差距，我们提出了一种深度去噪结构保留神经编码网络（DSNet），它能够对隐私保护编码脑电图表示进行准确分类，而无需解密。使用通用空间模式（CSP）提取脑电图特征，并将其转换为保护隐私的编码表示，同时保留其统计结构。这里，编码是指为隐私保护而设计的不可逆神经变换，而不是正式的密码学保证。评估了两种深度学习架构，即前馈神经网络 (NN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN)，以在编码特征空间中进行分类。此外，我们集成了法学硕士 (GPT-4)，以根据模型输出生成临床风格的摘要，从而增强临床医生审查和潜在临床支持用途的可解释性。结果和结论：使用公开可用的数据集，DSNet-NN 对每个受试者的准确率都超过 87%，优于 RNN 变体模型和基线模型。它还表现出了对模拟隐私攻击的抵御能力。法学硕士生成的报告为 MI 预测提供了临床医生友好的解释，支持潜在的现实应用性。本研究引入了一种人工智能框架，将保护隐私的脑电图解码与基于法学硕士的临床推理联系起来，为保护隐私的神经康复提供了实用的解决方案……

global_hot_topics.title: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kawasaki disease (KD) is a systemic vasculitis in children primarily affecting the coronary arteries, and studies suggest that the gut microbiota may be involved in KD pathogenesis, inflammatory responses, and immune regulation. This study employed an integrative multi-omics strategy to systematically investigate gut microbiota-metabolite interactions in KD. Key molecular targets were identified using network-based analyses and machine learning models, with Mendelian randomization providing causal validation. Single-cell transcriptomics and molecular docking further elucidated immune cell interactions and metabolite-protein binding, highlighting critical regulatory pathways. We identified SELP as a core molecular target in KD, predominantly expressed in platelets and involved in immune and inflammatory responses. Gut microbiota-derived metabolites, including palmitoylethanolamide, pantothenic acid, and 1-O-caffeoylglycerol, may regulate immune cell interactions via the RESISTIN signalling pathway. Altered abundances of microbial taxa such as Bacteroides, Parabacteroides, and Bifidobacterium suggest their potential role in inflammation modulation. Activation of IL-17, TNF, MAPK, and PI3K-Akt pathways further contributes to disease progression, highlighting the microbiota-metabolite-SELP axis as a potential therapeutic target in KD. These findings lay the groundwork for subsequent in vitro and in vivo studies, advancing the development of microbiome-based intervention strategies.

global_hot_topics.title: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Gonglin Tang; Fei Liu; Mingze Sun; Chenyue Liu; Jitao Wu; Hongwei Zhao
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC) features an immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). We investigated the role of transcription factor POU2F2 in KIRC oncogenesis and macrophage polarization. Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics showed that POU2F2 is upregulated in KIRC and associated with metastasis and poor prognosis. POU2F2 knockdown inhibited KIRC cell proliferation, migration, and invasion in vitro. POU2F2 expression correlated with macrophage infiltration and JAK-STAT signaling. Co-culture assays showed that POU2F2 silencing reduced macrophage recruitment and shifted M2 polarization toward an anti-tumor M1 phenotype. Overall, POU2F2 acts as an oncogenic driver and prognostic biomarker in KIRC, promoting an immunosuppressive TME and representing a potential therapeutic target.
global_hot_topics.title_en: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: POU2F2 作为肾透明细胞癌的双重致癌和免疫调节驱动因素。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 肾透明细胞癌 (KIRC) 具有免疫抑制肿瘤微环境 (TME)。我们研究了转录因子 POU2F2 在 KIRC 肿瘤发生和巨噬细胞极化中的作用。单细胞和空间转录组学表明 POU2F2 在 KIRC 中表达上调，并与转移和不良预后相关。 POU2F2 敲低可抑制 KIRC 细胞的体外增殖、迁移和侵袭。 POU2F2 表达与巨噬细胞浸润和 JAK-STAT 信号传导相关。共培养测定表明，POU2F2 沉默减少了巨噬细胞的招募，并将 M2 极化转向抗肿瘤 M1 表型。总体而言，POU2F2 在 KIRC 中充当致癌驱动因素和预后生物标志物，促进免疫抑制性 TME 并代表潜在的治疗靶点。

global_hot_topics.title: Rotation-traction manipulation versus cervical traction for axial neck pain caused by cervical degenerative disc disease: a multicenter randomized controlled trial.
global_hot_topics.authors: Yuhang Yang; Ping Wang; Minshan Feng; Xunlu Yin; Aifeng Liu; Chengliang Zhong; Shengqiang Zhang; Futai Gong
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Axial neck pain is a common manifestation of cervical degenerative disc disease (CDD). Rotation-traction manipulation (RTM) is widely used in China, but its comparative effectiveness and safety versus cervical traction remain uncertain. METHODS: In this prospective multicenter randomized controlled trial, 154 adults with CDD-related axial neck pain were randomized 1:1 to receive RTM (7 sessions over 2 weeks) or cervical traction (daily for 2 weeks). Outcomes were assessed at baseline, during treatment, and at 1 and 3 months after treatment. The primary outcome was pain intensity measured by the visual analogue scale (VAS); secondary outcomes were neck tenderness score (NTS) and cervical range of motion (ROM). Intention-to-treat analyses with multiple imputation were performed. RESULTS: All 154 randomized participants were included in the analyses, and 151 completed follow-up. Both groups showed significant improvement over time in VAS and ROM (both P < 0.001). Confirmatory mixed-effects analyses did not demonstrate significant between-group differences in VAS or ROM after adjustment for multiple comparisons. Exploratory analyses suggested that RTM provided faster improvement during the treatment phase and a small cumulative advantage in pain reduction, whereas cumulative ROM improvement did not differ significantly between groups. RTM was also associated with a faster reduction in neck tenderness severity. Adverse events were mild and infrequent, and no treatment-related radiographic deterioration was observed. CONCLUSIONS: Both RTM and cervical traction were associated with clinical improvement in patients with CDD-related axial neck pain. Confirmatory analyses did not demonstrate robust superiority of RTM for pain or cervical ROM, whereas exploratory analyses suggested faster early improvement and a small cumulative pain benefit with RTM. NTS findings should be interpreted cautiously because the tenderness score has not been formally validated. No serious adverse events were observed. TRIAL REGISTRATION: Chinese Clinical Trial Registry, ChiCTR2400082667. Registered retrospectively on 4 April 2024.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Rotation-traction manipulation versus cervical traction for axial neck pain caused by cervical degenerative disc disease: a multicenter randomized controlled trial.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 旋转牵引操作与颈椎牵引治疗颈椎退行性椎间盘疾病引起的轴性颈部疼痛：一项多中心随机对照试验。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：轴颈痛是颈椎退行性椎间盘疾病（CDD）的常见表现。旋转牵引手法（RTM）在中国广泛使用，但其与颈椎牵引的有效性和安全性比较仍不确定。方法：在这项前瞻性多中心随机对照试验中，154 名患有 CDD 相关轴性颈痛的成年人以 1:1 的比例随机接受 RTM（2 周内 7 次）或颈椎牵引（每天 2 周）。在基线、治疗期间以及治疗后 1 个月和 3 个月时评估结果。主要结果是通过视觉模拟评分（VAS）测量的疼痛强度；次要结果是颈部压痛评分（NTS）和颈部活动范围（ROM）。进行了多重插补的意向治疗分析。结果：所有 154 名随机参与者均纳入分析，其中 151 名完成了随访。随着时间的推移，两组的 VAS 和 ROM 均显示出显着改善（均 P < 0.001）。经多重比较调整后，验证性混合效应分析并未表明 VAS 或 ROM 存在显着组间差异。探索性分析表明，RTM 在治疗阶段提供了更快的改善，并且在减轻疼痛方面具有较小的累积优势，而累积 ROM 改善在组间没有显着差异。 RTM 还与颈部压痛严重程度的更快降低有关。不良事件轻微且罕见，并且未观察到与治疗相关的放射学恶化。结论：RTM 和颈椎牵引均与 CDD 相关轴性颈痛患者的临床改善相关。验证性分析并未证明 RTM 对于疼痛或颈椎 ROM 具有明显的优越性，而探索性分析表明 RTM 可以更快地实现早期改善，并且对累积疼痛有较小的益处。应谨慎解释 NTS 结果，因为压痛评分尚未得到正式验证。没有观察到严重的不良事件。试验注册：中国临床试验注册中心，ChiCTR2400082667。于 2024 年 4 月 4 日追溯注册。

global_hot_topics.title: Enteric-colonized
global_hot_topics.authors: Jillinda Yi Ling Toh; Sok Ching Tay; Zihui Lin; Evelyn Xiu Ling Loo; Jia Xu; Johan Gunnar Eriksson; Peter D Gluckman; Yap Seng Chong
global_hot_topics.abstract: Cronobacter sakazakii is an opportunistic foodborne pathogen known to cause severe neonatal infections. However, its subclinical effects on human health remain largely unexplored. Here, we report that intestinal colonization by Cronobacter is potentially correlated with human neurobehavioral alterations in the absence of bacterial translocation across host barriers. Analysis of fecal microbiota from the children in GUSTO cohort revealed that Cronobacter abundance was significantly and positively correlated with their emotional reactivity and affective problem scores, suggesting an association between gut Cronobacter colonization and emotional dysfunction. Using a zebrafish larvae model, we demonstrated that enteric colonization by C. sakazakii ATCC 25944 triggered a distinctive bending phenotype and locomotor instability, indicative of central nervous system (CNS) disturbance. Multi-omics profiling revealed upregulation of genes related to circadian rhythm (e.g., per2, nr1d1, nr1d2) and neuropsychiatric markers (hint1), alongside metabolic dysregulation involving lipid classes linked to neurodegenerative stress. Random mutagenesis coupled with whole-genome sequencing identified modifier variants in genes associated with lipopolysaccharide (LPS) biosynthesis and fimbrial adhesion, which attenuated the neurotoxic phenotype. LPS isolated from wild-type C. sakazakii, but not from mutants, reproduced the CNS impairment phenotype, highlighting its crucial virulence role. Collectively, our findings provide the first evidence that enteric Cronobacter colonization may affect human emotional development via gut-derived LPS signaling, emphasizing its underestimated role in the gut-brain axis and neurobehavioral health.
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 坂崎克罗诺杆菌是一种机会性食源性病原体，已知会导致严重的新生儿感染。然而，其对人类健康的亚临床影响在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这里，我们报告说，在没有细菌跨宿主屏障易位的情况下，克罗诺杆菌的肠道定植可能与人类神经行为改变相关。对 GUSTO 队列中儿童粪便微生物群的分析显示，克罗诺杆菌丰度与他们的情绪反应和情感问题评分显着正相关，表明肠道克罗诺杆菌定植与情绪功能障碍之间存在关联。使用斑马鱼幼虫模型，我们证明了坂崎梭菌 ATCC 25944 的肠道定植引发了独特的弯曲表型和运动不稳定，表明中枢神经系统（CNS）紊乱。多组学分析揭示了与昼夜节律相关的基因（例如，per2、nr1d1、nr1d2）和神经精神标记物（hint1）的上调，以及涉及与神经退行性应激相关的脂质类别的代谢失调。随机诱变与全基因组测序相结合，鉴定出与脂多糖（LPS）生物合成和菌毛粘附相关的基因中的修饰变异，从而减弱了神经毒性表型。从野生型坂崎棒状杆菌中分离出来的 LPS（而非从突变体中分离出来的）再现了中枢神经系统损伤表型，突出了其至关重要的毒力作用。总的来说，我们的研究结果提供了第一个证据，表明肠道克罗诺杆菌定植可能通过肠源性 LPS 信号传导影响人类情绪发育，强调了其在肠脑轴和神经行为健康中的作用被低估了。

global_hot_topics.title: Ecological restructuring of the nonbacterial fecal microbiome in obesity across human cohorts.
global_hot_topics.authors: Laura Gallardo-Nuell; Marisel Rosell-Díaz; Josep Garre-Olmo; Josep Puig; Rafael Ramos; Javier Pons; Vicente Pérez-Brocal; Andrés Moya
global_hot_topics.abstract: Obesity is a complex metabolic disorder increasingly linked to alterations in the gut microbiome. While most research has focused on bacterial communities, the contribution of nonbacterial components including viruses, archaea, and eukaryotic microorganisms remains insufficiently characterized. Here, we performed a multicohort analysis to investigate the role of the nonbacterial gut microbiome in obesity across three independent human cohorts. Using compositional analyses adjusted for key covariates and network based approaches, we identified consistent multikingdom alterations associated with obesity. Individuals without obesity showed a reproducible enrichment of methanogenic archaea, particularly Methanobrevibacter smithii and Methanobrevibacter millerae, whereas individuals with obesity were characterized by increased abundance of bacteriophages from the class Caudoviricetes. In an elderly cohort, eukaryotic taxa such as Blastocystis spp. were additionally associated with the without obesity group. These patterns were largely consistent across cohorts and robust to sex stratification. Beyond taxonomic differences, ecological network analyses revealed substantial reorganization of microbial interactions in obesity. The identity and composition of hub taxa differed significantly between obesity and without obesity networks across all cohorts, indicating a shift in the taxa occupying central ecological roles. Notably, these differences were observed even when similar microbial kingdoms were represented, underscoring the importance of species-level resolution. Collectively, our findings demonstrate that obesity is associated with coordinated compositional and ecological alterations across the nonbacterial gut microbiome. This multikingdom perspective expands current understanding of microbiome dysbiosis in metabolic disease and highlights the archaeome and virome as potential contributors to host metabolic health.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Ecological restructuring of the nonbacterial fecal microbiome in obesity across human cohorts.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 人类肥胖人群中非细菌粪便微生物组的生态重建。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 肥胖是一种复杂的代谢紊乱，与肠道微生物组的改变越来越相关。虽然大多数研究都集中在细菌群落上，但包括病毒、古细菌和真核微生物在内的非细菌成分的贡献仍然没有得到充分的表征。在这里，我们进行了多队列分析，以研究非细菌肠道微生物组在三个独立人类队列中肥胖中的作用。使用针对关键协变量和基于网络的方法进行调整的成分分析，我们确定了与肥胖相关的一致的多界改变。不肥胖的个体表现出产甲烷古菌的可重复富集，特别是史密斯甲烷短杆菌和米勒甲烷短杆菌，而肥胖个体的特征是来自有尾病毒纲的噬菌体丰度增加。在老年群体中，真核生物类群如芽囊藻属。还与非肥胖组相关。这些模式在各个队列中基本一致，并且对性别分层具有很强的稳健性。除了分类学差异之外，生态网络分析还揭示了肥胖中微生物相互作用的实质性重组。在所有群体中，肥胖网络和无肥胖网络之间的中心类群的身份和组成存在显着差异，表明占据核心生态角色的类群发生了变化。值得注意的是，即使代表相似的微生物界，也观察到这些差异，这强调了物种水平分辨率的重要性。总的来说，我们的研究结果表明，肥胖与非细菌肠道微生物组的协调组成和生态改变有关。这种多界视角扩展了目前对代谢疾病中微生物组失调的理解，并强调古细菌组和病毒组是宿主代谢健康的潜在贡献者。

medical_news.title: This sugar-coated therapy boosted survival against deadly brain cancer by 50% in mice
medical_news.abstract: A new experimental treatment may have found a way to outsmart glioblastoma’s toughest defense: the blood-brain barrier. Researchers used sugar-coated nanoparticles to ferry genetic instructions that restore a key tumor-suppressing protein directly into brain cancer cells. In mouse studies, the therapy increased median survival by 50% while shrinking tumors without noticeable damage to other organs.
medical_news.title_en: This sugar-coated therapy boosted survival against deadly brain cancer by 50% in mice
medical_news.title_cn: 这种糖衣疗法使小鼠的致命脑癌存活率提高了 50%
medical_news.abstract_cn: 一种新的实验性治疗方法可能已经找到了一种方法，可以智胜胶质母细胞瘤最坚固的防御系统：血脑屏障。研究人员使用糖衣纳米粒子来传递遗传指令，将关键的肿瘤抑制蛋白直接恢复到脑癌细胞中。在小鼠研究中，该疗法使中位生存率提高了 50%，同时缩小了肿瘤，且对其他器官没有明显损害。

medical_news.title: Common constipation drug may help clear depression brain fog
medical_news.abstract: An existing constipation drug may have an unexpected new use: helping clear the "brain fog" that often lingers after depression. In a small clinical trial, people with a history of depression who took the medication prucalopride for about a week performed better on tests of memory, attention, and thinking speed than those who received a placebo. The drug targets a serotonin receptor found in both the gut and the brain, and researchers saw no significant side effects.
medical_news.title_en: Common constipation drug may help clear depression brain fog
medical_news.title_cn: 常见的便秘药物可能有助于清除抑郁症脑雾
medical_news.abstract_cn: 现有的便秘药物可能有一个意想不到的新用途：帮助清除抑郁症后经常残留的“脑雾”。在一项小型临床试验中，有抑郁症病史的人服用普卡必利药物约一周，在记忆力、注意力和思维速度测试中比服用安慰剂的人表现更好。该药物针对肠道和大脑中的血清素受体，研究人员没有发现明显的副作用。

medical_news.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.abstract: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply. A new review examined five randomized clinical trials involving 238 participants and found mixed results. Two studies, both involving women with major depressive disorder, reported that adding creatine to standard treatment improved symptoms, while three others found no meaningful benefit.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家称肌酸可能有助于对抗抑郁症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 肌酸最著名的是一种肌肉增强补充剂，但科学家们现在正在研究它是否也可以通过增加大脑的能量供应来帮助治疗抑郁症。一项新的综述审查了 5 项涉及 238 名参与者的随机临床试验，发现结果好坏参半。两项研究均涉及患有重度抑郁症的女性，报告称在标准治疗中添加肌酸可以改善症状，而其他三项研究则没有发现任何有意义的益处。

medical_news.title: Popular weight-loss drugs Ozempic and Wegovy may slow biological aging
medical_news.abstract: Researchers found that semaglutide, the active ingredient in Ozempic and Wegovy, slowed biological aging markers in adults with HIV, marking the first clinical evidence that the drug may influence human aging. Although the findings are encouraging, scientists say larger studies are needed before concluding that the medication can help people age more slowly.
medical_news.title_en: Popular weight-loss drugs Ozempic and Wegovy may slow biological aging

medical_news.title: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's kills brain cells
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a previously overlooked mechanism of brain cell death that appears to play a major role in Alzheimer's disease and frontotemporal dementia. The finding could lead to new treatments aimed at slowing neuron loss by interrupting the process before cells are destroyed.

medical_news.title: New Alzheimer's drug repairs DNA damage and reduces brain inflammation
medical_news.abstract: A drug originally developed for spinal cord injury may offer a fresh approach to treating Alzheimer’s disease. In mouse studies, KCL-286 repaired dangerous DNA damage, reduced inflammation, and targeted multiple disease-related pathways instead of focusing on just amyloid or tau. Since it has already cleared an initial human safety trial, researchers believe it could move more quickly into Alzheimer’s clinical testing.
medical_news.title_en: New Alzheimer's drug repairs DNA damage and reduces brain inflammation
medical_news.title_cn: 新的阿尔茨海默病药物可修复 DNA 损伤并减少大脑炎症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 一种最初开发用于脊髓损伤的药物可能为治疗阿尔茨海默病提供一种新方法。在小鼠研究中，KCL-286 修复了危险的 DNA 损伤，减少炎症，并针对多种疾病相关途径，而不是仅仅关注淀粉样蛋白或 tau 蛋白。由于它已经通过了初步的人体安全试验，研究人员相信它可以更快地进入阿尔茨海默氏症的临床测试。

medical_news.title: AI Speech Neuroprosthesis Restores Voice to ALS Patient
medical_news.abstract: Tested in an individual with advanced ALS, the interface enabled the real-time expression of 2.7 million words over two years, including vocal intonation modulation and singing, marking a transformative milestone for clinical brain-computer interfaces.

medical_news.title: New MRI breakthrough reveals the brain and eye like never before
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have redesigned a key piece of MRI hardware using metamaterials, allowing existing scanners to produce clearer images of difficult-to-see parts of the body in less time. The breakthrough could improve diagnoses, make scans more comfortable, and open the door to new medical imaging and treatment applications.
medical_news.title_en: New MRI breakthrough reveals the brain and eye like never before
medical_news.title_cn: 核磁共振成像的新突破以前所未有的方式揭示了大脑和眼睛
medical_news.abstract_cn: 科学家们利用超材料重新设计了 MRI 硬件的一个关键部分，使现有的扫描仪能够在更短的时间内对身体难以看到的部位产生更清晰的图像。这一突破可以改善诊断，使扫描更加舒适，并为新的医学成像和治疗应用打开大门。
